appraisal_events.evidence: Il la tenait par l'épaule, l'appuyant contre lui... — Surtout, ne me parlez pas... Cela ne vous gêne pas que je remette droites les fleurs de votre corsage... je voudrais les enfoncer un peu.
appraisal_events.explanation: Swann takes protective and directive initiative, physically supporting Odette and using the pretext of adjusting her flowers to secure intimate proximity, which locally elevates his position in the encounter.

status_effects.explanation: He gains immediate emotional and physical leverage by calming Odette and initiating intimate contact.
